title: Durability Overlay
body:
___
![Demonstration of the resource pack, different types of armor at different durabilities on armor stands next to each other on an inclined surface. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b80a3a93dcb40e5c51d6727c0f19d70520cc564.png)
___
Resource pack that creates an outline for armor pieces when they are damaged, changing in color depending on the durability. Feel free to report issues or offer suggestions to me on Discord!
Barebones version also available as an optional (but separate) pack.
___
**UAYOR!** Don't use this pack in servers it is not allowed in, check with server staff to make sure.  
The updated texture pack includes formatting from https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/armor-durability-overlay by Phiro811.
Used with explicit permission. Make sure to also check out his pack!
